case_title: FELICITY JOYCE VS. USA TRIATHLON et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOYCE, FELICITY AS TO DEFENDANT USA TRIATHLON DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-19-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-15-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-04-2012

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ROGER L SISNEROS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-11-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-27-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-26-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-11-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-11-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-31-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-11-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-29-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AND PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-19-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-31-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 AGAINST ROGER L SISNEROS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-29-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-13-2013. NOTE: SANCTIONS PREVIOUSLY ISSUED TO ROGER L. SISNEROS, ESQ. IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE DEC-11-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ARE ALSO DUE. TOTAL AMOUNT DUE $850.00. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
